name: christianwriter-ai
description: AI-powered writing tools for Christian content creators. Create devotionals, sermons, and social media content with Scripture at the center.

features.name: Devotional Generator
features.description: Create meaningful daily devotionals with Scripture references and reflection questions

features.name: Sermon Outline Generator
features.description: Generate structured sermon outlines in expository, topical, or narrative styles

features.name: Social Media Content
features.description: Craft engaging posts optimized for Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn

features.name: Author Voice Matching
features.description: Train the AI to match your unique writing style

features.name: Scripture Integration
features.description: Access NIV, ESV, KJV, and more Bible versions

features.name: Export Options
features.description: Download content as Word documents or PDF files

features.name: Theological Guardrails
features.description: AI configured for Scripture-first, theologically accurate content generation

projectStructure:
christianwriter-ai/
├── src/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── (marketing)/      # Landing, pricing, features pages
│   │   ├── (auth)/           # Sign-in, sign-up pages
│   │   ├── (dashboard)/      # Protected routes
│   │   │   └── dashboard/
│   │   │       ├── devotionals/
│   │   │       ├── sermons/
│   │   │       ├── social/
│   │   │       └── author-voice/
│   │   └── api/              # API routes
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── ui/               # Base components
│   │   ├── layout/           # Navbar, Footer, Sidebar
│   │   ├── generators/       # Content creation forms
│   │   └── marketing/        # Landing page sections
│   └── lib/
│       ├── db/               # Drizzle schema + connection
│       ├── ai/               # Claude client + prompts
│       ├── scripture/        # Bible API integration
│       └── export/           # PDF/Word export utilities
├── drizzle/                  # Migration files
└── scripts/                  # Build & generation scripts
deployment:
Deployed on **Vercel** with automatic deploys from the `main` branch.

1. Push to `main` triggers Vercel build
2. Configure env vars in Vercel dashboard
3. Database hosted on Neon (serverless PostgreSQL)
